FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3 && \
    apt-get install -qq -y -o Acquire::Retries=3 \
        cmake \
        gcc \
        g++ \
        clang \
        lld \
        build-essential \
        libjpeg-turbo8-dev \
        libimagequant-dev \
        libpng-dev \
        libwebp-dev \
        libtiff5-dev \
        libfreetype-dev \
        libavif-dev \
        libavifile-0.7-dev \
        libxpm-dev \
        libraqm-dev \
        dh-autoreconf \
        ninja-build \
        nasm \
        meson \
        software-properties-common \
        git \
        ca-certificates && \
    add-apt-repository -y ppa:strukturag/libde265 && \
    add-apt-repository -y ppa:strukturag/libheif && \
    apt-get update -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3 && \
    apt-get install -qq -y -o Acquire::Retries=3 \
        libde265-dev \
        libx265-dev \
        libheif-dev \
        libheif-plugin-aomenc \
        libheif-plugin-x265 \
        libheif-plugin-aomdec && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN mkdir -p suppressions && \
    echo "" > suppressions/lsan.supp

COPY run.sh /run.sh

RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -e

cd /app

export CC=gcc
export CXX=g++
export CFLAGS="-msse2"
export BUILD_TYPE=RELWITHDEBINFO
export TMP=/tmp

echo "=== Configuring CMake ==="
cmake -DENABLE_PNG=1 -DENABLE_FREETYPE=1 -DENABLE_JPEG=1 -DENABLE_WEBP=1 \
  -DENABLE_TIFF=1 -DENABLE_XPM=1 -DENABLE_GD_FORMATS=1 -DENABLE_HEIF=1 -DENABLE_RAQM=1 -DENABLE_AVIF=1 \
  -DBUILD_TEST=1 -B /app/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE

echo "=== Building ==="
cmake --build /app/build --config $BUILD_TYPE --parallel 4

echo "=== Running Tests ==="
cd /app/build
export LSAN_OPTIONS="suppressions=/app/suppressions/lsan.supp"
CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 ctest -C $BUILD_TYPE || TEST_RESULT=$?

if [ -f "/app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log" ]; then
  echo "=== Test Log ==="
  cat /app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log
fi

if [ -z "$TEST_RESULT" ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
fi

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3 && \
    apt-get install -qq -y -o Acquire::Retries=3 \
        cmake \
        gcc \
        g++ \
        clang \
        lld \
        build-essential \
        libjpeg-turbo8-dev \
        libimagequant-dev \
        libpng-dev \
        libwebp-dev \
        libtiff5-dev \
        libfreetype-dev \
        libavif-dev \
        libavifile-0.7-dev \
        libxpm-dev \
        libraqm-dev \
        dh-autoreconf \
        ninja-build \
        nasm \
        meson \
        software-properties-common \
        git \
        ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Try to add PPAs for libde265 and libheif, but don't fail if they don't exist
RUN apt-get update -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3 && \
    (add-apt-repository -y ppa:strukturag/libde265 2>/dev/null || true) && \
    (add-apt-repository -y ppa:strukturag/libheif 2>/dev/null || true) && \
    apt-get update -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3 2>/dev/null || true && \
    (apt-get install -qq -y -o Acquire::Retries=3 \
        libde265-dev \
        libx265-dev \
        libheif-dev \
        libheif-plugin-aomenc \
        libheif-plugin-x265 \
        libheif-plugin-aomdec 2>/dev/null || true) && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN mkdir -p suppressions && \
    echo "" > suppressions/lsan.supp

COPY run.sh /run.sh

RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

```bash

```

If TEST_RESULT is empty (which means ctest succeeded, exit code 0), then we print SUCCESS. If TEST_RESULT is set (ctest failed), we print FAIL.

cd /app

export CC=gcc
export CXX=g++
export CFLAGS="-msse2"
export BUILD_TYPE=RELWITHDEBINFO
export TMP=/tmp

  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== Building ==="
cmake --build /app/build --config $BUILD_TYPE --parallel 4

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== Running Tests ==="
cd /app/build
export LSAN_OPTIONS="suppressions=/app/suppressions/lsan.supp"
CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 ctest -C $BUILD_TYPE
TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?

if [ -f "/app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log" ]; then
  echo "=== Test Log ==="
  cat /app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log
fi

if [ $TEST_EXIT_CODE -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -e

cd /app

export CC=gcc
export CXX=g++
export CFLAGS="-msse2"
export BUILD_TYPE=RELWITHDEBINFO
export TMP=/tmp

echo "=== Configuring CMake ==="
cmake -DENABLE_PNG=1 -DENABLE_FREETYPE=1 -DENABLE_JPEG=1 -DENABLE_WEBP=1 \
  -DENABLE_TIFF=1 -DENABLE_XPM=1 -DENABLE_GD_FORMATS=1 -DENABLE_HEIF=1 -DENABLE_RAQM=1 -DENABLE_AVIF=1 \
  -DBUILD_TEST=1 -B /app/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE

echo "=== Building ==="
cmake --build /app/build --config $BUILD_TYPE --parallel 4

echo "=== Running Tests ==="
cd /app/build
export LSAN_OPTIONS="suppressions=/app/suppressions/lsan.supp"
CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 ctest -C $BUILD_TYPE || TEST_RESULT=$?

if [ -f "/app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log" ]; then
  echo "=== Test Log ==="
  cat /app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log
fi

if [ -z "$TEST_RESULT" ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash

cd /app

export CC=gcc
export CXX=g++
export CFLAGS="-msse2"
export BUILD_TYPE=RELWITHDEBINFO
export TMP=/tmp

echo "=== Configuring CMake ==="
cmake -DENABLE_PNG=1 -DENABLE_FREETYPE=1 -DENABLE_JPEG=1 -DENABLE_WEBP=1 \
  -DENABLE_TIFF=1 -DENABLE_XPM=1 -DENABLE_GD_FORMATS=1 -DENABLE_HEIF=1 -DENABLE_RAQM=1 -DENABLE_AVIF=1 \
  -DBUILD_TEST=1 -B /app/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== Building ==="
cmake --build /app/build --config $BUILD_TYPE --parallel 4

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi

echo "=== Running Tests ==="
cd /app/build
export LSAN_OPTIONS="suppressions=/app/suppressions/lsan.supp"
CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 ctest -C $BUILD_TYPE
TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?

if [ -f "/app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log" ]; then
  echo "=== Test Log ==="
  cat /app/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log
fi

if [ $TEST_EXIT_CODE -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi
